[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 001001100 3
1 101111001 6
2 111000001 4
3 111110110 7
4 000100001 2
5 010111011 6
6 111001110 6
7 011111111 8
